overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy exploring a desert settlement at sunset. She walks past a campfire and tribal tents, through a monumental stone gate, and along a path lined with ancient pillars toward the city of Sunfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement with campfire and temporary shelters

events.description: character turns away from campfire and begins walking toward the settlement entrance

agents.ego_description: walking around the campfire and surveying the settlement surroundings

notable_agents.action: sitting near the campfire in the background

entered.detail: large bonfire with visible flames and smoke
massive ancient stone fortress with multiple towers dominating the background
canvas tents with wooden supports scattered across the settlement
rough wooden platforms and structures near the campfire

segments.scene_description: The character stands near a blazing campfire in a desert settlement at sunset, with the massive Sunfall fortress looming in the background. She walks around the fire, passing tribal tents and wooden structures as the warm golden light bathes the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental stone gate entrance to Sunfall

events.description: character walks through the large stone archway marking the settlement entrance
location text 'Sunfall' appears on screen indicating the area name
text 'Entering Settlement Sunfall' appears confirming location entry

agents.ego_description: walking toward and passing through the monumental stone gate into Sunfall

notable_agents.action: walking through the gate archway ahead of the player character

entered.detail: large carved stone gate with geometric patterns and tall pillars
stone pillar with tribal symbols and decorative carvings

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive carved stone archway marking the entrance to Sunfall. She passes through the gate as on-screen text identifies the location, with the fortress now visible to the right and a path lined with monuments opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient processional way with monumental pillars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the path toward the distant city, observing the ancient ruins

entered.detail: tall ancient stone pillars lining both sides of the path toward the city

segments.scene_description: Walking along the ancient processional way, the character moves between rows of tall stone pillars toward Sunfall. The fortress grows larger on the right as she advances along the desert path, with the warm sunset light casting long shadows across the ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desert settlement that transitions from a cozy tribal camp into a grand, ancient processional way leading toward a fortress. It begins beside a blazing campfire, moving past tribal tents and wooden structures bathed in warm golden sunset light. As the character advances, the scene opens up to a massive carved stone archway, passing through the gate as the Sunfall fortress becomes visible to the right. The path then expands into a wide processional way lined with tall stone pillars, where the camera moves forward as the fortress grows larger in the distance. Finally, the journey continues along the desert ruins, with the deepening sunset casting long shadows across the ancient monuments.
